Minor'S Compromise (As To Minor Jeffrey Chen)
Off Calendar Aug-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: A. Howell, CSR #3542

William Weiss, Esq. for Petitioner(s): Jeffrey Chen, as guardian ad litem for and with: Mason Chen, a minor Claimant,
Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Reimbursement of litigation costs and expenses total $275.18
A net balance of $4,834.82

to be deposited into a blocked account with
Wells Fargo Bank, 850 LaPlaya Street, San Francisco, CA. until Minor's reaches the age of 18 years.

Order signed by Judge Begert.

Minor'S Compromise (As To Minor Gregory Chen)
Off Calendar Aug-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: A. Howell, #3542

William Weiss, Esq. for Petitioner(s): Mason Chen, as guardian ad litem for and with: Gregory Chen, a minor Claimant,
Petitioner was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Reimbursement of medical expenses total $286.86
A net balance of $4,713.34

to be deposited into a blocked account with
Wells Fargo Bank, 850 La Playa , San Francisco, CA. until Minor's reaches the age of 18 years.

Order signed by Judge Chaitin.
